ham.subject: Monthly IT Security Newsletter – September 2026
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Welcome to the September edition of the IT Security Newsletter. We bring you the latest updates, upcoming training, and a quick reminder of our security best practices.

• New Password Policy – Effective October 1, 2026. Passphrases must be at least 12 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols. Please review the policy in Confluence.
• Security Awareness Training – Your annual refresher is now available. Complete it by 15th October to renew your access.
• Vulnerability Bulletin – CVE‑2026‑XXXX now mitigated; our patch has been applied to all Windows servers.
• Two‑Factor Authentication (2FA) Rollout – All employees are required to enable 2FA on the corporate portal by end of month.

Thank you for your continued cooperation in keeping our environment secure.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: Alert: Unauthorized Login Attempt – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Our security monitoring system has detected an attempt to access your corporate account from an unrecognized location. If you did not initiate this activity, your account will be temporarily suspended until the issue is resolved.

Please verify your identity immediately by logging in through the link below. Failure to respond within 24 hours will result in a permanent suspension of your account.

Verify Now: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Senior IT Security, Acme Corporation
